prompt: Storybook 3D render, soft cute Pixar-like children's illustration style, glossy clay look with gentle studio lighting and soft ambient occlusion. A neat horizontal row of exactly THREE candy-themed dragon eggs, well separated with generous empty space between each one, each egg the same size and shape, standing upright. Egg 1: soft strawberry-PINK glossy shell speckled with tiny red candy sprinkles and a creamy off-white belly zone. Egg 2: cotton-candy SKY-BLUE glossy shell speckled with tiny white sugar sprinkles. Egg 3: mint GREEN-APPLE glossy shell with a soft white candy swirl and tiny sprinkles. Smooth rounded eggs, cheerful pastel confectionery vibe, each with a small soft round drop shadow beneath it. PURE SOLID WHITE background (#FFFFFF), evenly lit, no gradient, no floor line, no props. IMPORTANT: absolutely NO text, NO letters, NO numbers, NO labels, NO watermark, NO logos anywhere. Centered, clean product-catalog grid layout with equal spacing.
obs: Estagio 0 (ovo intacto) de cada cor sai daqui: recortar cada ovo. Fundo branco puro, grade separada, proibido texto.

prompt: Storybook 3D render, soft cute Pixar-like children's illustration, glossy clay look, gentle studio lighting, soft shadows. FOUR poses of THE SAME baby sugar dragon character in a single row, left to right, well separated with clear empty space between each pose, all the same character identity, same STRAWBERRY-PINK color scheme (pink glossy scales, tiny red candy-sprinkle spots, creamy off-white belly, big friendly shiny eyes, tiny rounded wings, stubby tail). Pose 1 (HATCHING): the pink candy egg cracked open with a jagged crack and warm light glowing from inside, a tiny snout and one little eye peeking out. Pose 2 (BABY): a newborn baby pink dragon just hatched, oversized cute head, tiny body, sitting, half of the eggshell as a little hat or around its bottom, adorable. Pose 3 (YOUNG): the same pink dragon a bit bigger, standing on two legs, slightly larger wings, confident happy smile. Pose 4 (ADULT CHEF): the same pink dragon grown up, taller and rounder, wearing a small white confectioner's CHEF TOQUE hat, proud friendly pose, maybe holding nothing. Consistent character, consistent lighting and scale progression across the four. Each figure has a soft round drop shadow. PURE SOLID WHITE background (#FFFFFF), evenly lit, no gradient, no floor line, no props besides the eggshell in pose 1 and the chef hat in pose 4. IMPORTANT: absolutely NO text, NO letters, NO numbers, NO labels, NO watermark. Clean catalog grid, equal spacing.
obs: Estagios 1-4 do Docinho ROSA (morango): rachando, filhote, jovem, adulto-chef. Recortar 4 poses.
